description: Implement the SettingsRepository class in the PodcastPlayer project using Jetpack DataStore Preferences. This involves adding the `androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences` dependency (version 1.0.0 or higher) to `app/build.gradle.kts` and completing the repository implementation in `app/src/main/java/com/example/podcastplayer/data/SettingsRepository.kt`. The implementation must include preference keys for `playback_speed` (Float, default 1.0) and `enable_auto_download` (Boolean, default true), providing the corresponding data flows and suspending update functions. Ensure that `IOException` during data reads is handled by emitting empty preferences. Verify the completed implementation using the unit tests located in `app/src/test/java/com/example/podcastplayer/data/SettingsRepositoryTest.kt`.
